hooks.command: npm run build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Build failed — commit blocked. Fix the errors above first."}' }

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: A git commit was just made. Review the changes in that commit and update README.md if any features, game modes, setup steps, or deployment details changed."}}'
